channel.title: Projects on Jung Yeon Park
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Jung Yeon Park

item.title: CPTs
item.description: Semiconductor wafers are processed at fabs with many different types of semiconductor tools, and may undergo several thousand process steps before they are packaged into the final product. Clustered photolithography tools (CPTs) are one of the most complex and expensive types of semiconductor equipment, where a single such tool may cost hundreds of millions of dollars. As such, CPTs are typically the fabricator bottleneck and contribute significantly to the fab cycle time.
